text: Mali: Tuareg rebel spokesman Mohamed Ramadane says Mali’s junta is on the brink amid a major offensive: “The regime will fall.” Rebels (FLA + JNIM) launched coordinated attacks across Mali, including Kidal, Gao, and near Bamako. Kidal was captured, with army/Russian forces withdrawing. JNIM was described as “partners” / “cousins” in the fight. Source: AFP
text_zh: 马里：图阿雷格叛军发言人穆罕默德·拉马丹表示，在一次重大攻势下，马里军政府已处于崩溃边缘：“政权将会倒台。”叛军（FLA + JNIM）在马里各地发动了协同袭击，包括基达尔、加奥以及巴马科附近。基达尔已被占领，军队/俄罗斯部队撤离。JNIM被描述为战斗中的“伙伴”/“表亲”。来源：法新社

text: Israel’s war cost has reached about NIS 405 billion (~$137 billion) since Oct. 7, according to Bank of Israel Governor Amir Yaron, putting heavy strain on the economy. Debt jumped from ~60% to ~70% of GDP, wiping out years of fiscal gains. Defense spending surged +130% to NIS 143B (8.8% of GDP). Officials warn of a “trauma economy” if trends continue. Risk: debt could climb toward ~80% of GDP.
text_zh: 据以色列银行行长阿米尔·亚隆称，自10月7日以来，以色列的战争成本已达到约4050亿新谢克尔（约1370亿美元），给经济造成了沉重负担。债务占GDP的比例从约60%跃升至约70%，抹去了多年的财政收益。国防支出激增130%，达到1430亿新谢克尔（占GDP的8.8%）。官员们警告称，如果这种趋势持续下去，将出现“创伤经济”。风险：债务可能攀升至GDP的约80%。

text: NEW: Armed attackers opened fire on a police patrol in Zahedan, Iran this morning. Two officers — First Sergeant Mohammadreza Nezamdoost and First Lieutenant Ali Momeni — were killed, and two others were wounded.
text_zh: 快讯：今天早上，武装袭击者在伊朗扎黑丹向一支警察巡逻队开火。两名警官——一级中士穆罕默德礼萨·内扎姆杜斯特和中尉阿里·莫梅尼——被杀，另有两人受伤。

text: Ukraine's Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha: Ukraine has officially addressed Israel through diplomatic and legal channels, requesting action on the “PANORMITIS” vessel. The Prosecutor General’s Office of Ukraine has submitted a relevant request to the Israeli authorities based on a Ukrainian court ruling to arrest the vessel as part of the ongoing investigation. The vessel is suspected of carrying a grain cargo that was illegally transported from a closed port in the temporarily occupied territory of Ukraine in violation of international law and Ukrainian legislation. This is not Twitter diplomacy, but a very concrete legal and diplomatic request for international legal assistance that necessitates a response. We expect the Israeli side to take it seriously rather than responding with emotional statements.
text_zh: 乌克兰外交部长安德烈·西比哈：乌克兰已通过外交和法律渠道正式向以色列提出交涉，要求对“PANORMITIS”号船只采取行动。乌克兰总检察长办公室根据乌克兰法院的裁决，已向以色列当局提交了相关请求，要求在正在进行的调查中扣押该船。该船涉嫌运载从乌克兰临时占领区封闭港口非法运输的谷物货物，违反了国际法和乌克兰法律。这不是推特外交，而是一个非常具体的法律和外交援助请求，需要得到回应。我们期望以色列方面认真对待，而不是以情绪化的声明来回应。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif described the twenty-one hour long negotiation session between the U.S.and Iran on April 11th as a marathon session. He reiterated that Pakistan made full efforts to help establish peace in the region, with Field Marshal Asim Munir, Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar and other senior figures playing key roles. Officials said those efforts helped secure an extension of the ceasefire, which they said remains in effect. He added that before Araghchi travelled to Russia, Pakistani officials spoke with him by phone and said he expressed sincere intent regarding his meetings in Oman and indicated that, after consultations with Iran’s leadership, a positive response could come soon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫将4月11日美国和伊朗之间长达21小时的谈判会议描述为一场马拉松式的会议。他重申，巴基斯坦为帮助建立地区和平做出了全力努力，陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔、外交部长伊沙克·达尔和其他高级人物发挥了关键作用。官员们表示，这些努力有助于确保停火协议的延长，他们称该协议仍然有效。他补充说，在阿拉格齐前往俄罗斯之前，巴基斯坦官员曾与他通电话，他说阿拉格齐表达了对阿曼会议的真诚意图，并表示在与伊朗领导层磋商后，很快可能会有积极的回应。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 Al Jadeed information: Former Palestinian ambassador Ashraf Dabour was detained at Beirut airport based on the lawsuit filed against him on corruption charges. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 Al Jadeed消息：前巴勒斯坦大使阿什拉夫·达布尔因针对他的腐败指控诉讼在贝鲁特机场被拘留。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel North Korea's nuclear arsenal is approaching the threshold needed to overwhelm U.S. missile defenses. The U.S. has 44 ground-based interceptors capable of handling roughly 20–25 incoming missiles. North Korea is producing 12–15 warheads per year and fielding multiple ICBM types with solid-fuel engines and decoy capabilities. - Bloomberg. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 朝鲜的核武库正接近足以压倒美国导弹防御系统的临界点。美国拥有44枚陆基拦截导弹，能够处理大约20-25枚来袭导弹。朝鲜每年生产12-15枚弹头，并部署了多种带有固体燃料发动机和诱饵能力的洲际弹道导弹。 - 彭博社。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Army says a soldier and his brother were killed in an Israeli airstrike on their motorcycle in Khirbet Salim, southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩军队称，一名士兵及其兄弟在黎巴嫩南部希尔贝特萨利姆的一次以色列空袭中丧生。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇨🇦 Operation D-Day: The Architecture of Industrial War in Normandy6 June 1944, dawn.The coast of Normandy, turned by the Germans into the “Atlantic Wall”, became the site of the largest, most complex amphibious operation in human history.This was not just a landing. It was a total system — strategy, deception, technology, engineering, logistics and raw human courage working as one. The Deception - Operation Fortitude was one of the greatest military deceptions ever. The Allies created a phantom army (FUSAG) under General Patton in southeast England — inflatable tanks, fake airfields, false radio traffic, and double agents. Hitler and Rommel stayed convinced the real invasion would come at Pas-de-Calais. Because of this, powerful German panzer divisions remained far from Normandy during the critical first hours. The Night Before - Long before sunrise, three airborne divisions (US 82nd & 101st, British 6th) jumped into the darkness. Their job: seize bridges, block roads, destroy artillery, and sow chaos. Scattered by bad weather and flak, they created dozens of small battlefields. The resulting confusion paralyzed German command. The Beaches ‐ At dawn, five sectors were assaulted: • Utah – relatively successful • Omaha – the bloodiest, a true hell of machine guns and cliffs • Gold, Juno, Sword – British & Canadian sectorsThe British used Hobart’s Funnies — specialized tanks (mine flails, flame throwers, bridge-layers, bunker-busters) that gave them a huge engineering advantage. The Americans used DD amphibious Shermans — many of which sank in the rough seas at Omaha.On Omaha, the first waves were slaughtered. What saved the day was not grand strategy, but small-unit leadership — sergeants and lieutenants leading improvised assaults, blowing gaps with Bangalore torpedoes and satchel charges. The Real Victory - Even after the beaches were taken, the hardest part remained: sustaining the force. Normandy had no large ports. So the Allies brought their own — the giant Mulberry artificial harbors, towed piece by piece across the Channel and assembled under fire. At the same time, PLUTO (Pipeline Under The Ocean) pumped fuel from Britain directly to France. The Lesson - D-Day was not won by perfection. Many things went wrong — weather, intelligence, equipment failures. But the Allied system was simply better coordinated than the German one at every level: strategic deception, air & naval superiority, specialized engineering, tactical initiative, and industrial logistics. It was the birth of modern combined-arms warfare — the model that still shapes military thinking today.Respect to every soldier who stepped off those landing craft 81 years ago. Their courage and the genius behind the operation changed the course of the 20th century. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇨🇦 D日行动：诺曼底工业战争的架构 1944年6月6日，黎明。诺曼底海岸被德国人变成了“大西洋壁垒”，成为人类历史上最大、最复杂的两栖作战地点。这不仅仅是一次登陆。它是一个完整的系统——战略、欺骗、技术、工程、后勤和纯粹的人类勇气合而为一。欺骗——坚忍行动是有史以来最伟大的军事欺骗之一。盟军在英格兰东南部组建了一支由巴顿将军指挥的幽灵军队（FUSAG）——充气坦克、假机场、虚假无线电通信和双重间谍。希特勒和隆美尔始终坚信真正的入侵将发生在加来海峡。正因如此，强大的德国装甲师在关键的最初几个小时里远离诺曼底。前夜——在日出前很久，三个空降师（美国第82和第101空降师，英国第6空降师）跳入黑暗中。他们的任务：夺取桥梁、封锁道路、摧毁炮兵并播下混乱。由于恶劣天气和高射炮火，他们分散开来，制造了数十个小战场。由此产生的混乱瘫痪了德国指挥部。海滩——黎明时分，五个区域遭到攻击：• 犹他——相对成功 • 奥马哈——最血腥，真正的机枪和悬崖地狱 • 黄金、朱诺、剑——英军和加军区域。英国人使用了霍巴特的“滑稽坦克”——专门的坦克（扫雷坦克、喷火坦克、架桥坦克、碉堡破坏者），这给了他们巨大的工程优势。美国人使用了DD两栖谢尔曼坦克——其中许多在奥马哈汹涌的海面上沉没。在奥马哈，第一波攻击者被屠杀。拯救局面的不是宏大的战略，而是小单位的领导力——中士和中尉带领临时突击，用班加罗尔鱼雷和背包炸药炸开缺口。真正的胜利——即使在占领海滩后，最困难的部分仍然是维持部队。诺曼底没有大型港口。因此，盟军带来了他们自己的——巨大的桑树人工港，一块一块地拖过海峡并在炮火下组装。与此同时，PLUTO（海底管道）将燃料从英国直接泵送到法国。教训——D日行动并非完美无缺。许多事情出了差错——天气、情报、设备故障。但盟军的系统在各个层面上都比德国系统协调得更好：战略欺骗、空中和海上优势、专业工程、战术主动性和工业后勤。这是现代诸兵种合成作战的诞生——至今仍塑造军事思维的模式。向81年前走下那些登陆艇的每一位士兵致敬。他们的勇气和行动背后的天才改变了20世纪的进程。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇵🇱 🇺🇦 Defence24 reports that Poland plans to test its military equipment and drones in Ukraine. 🔹 Deputy Defense Minister Cezary Tomczyk said Ukraine serves as a “unique testing environment” due to active combat, with systems first evaluated in Poland and then under real battlefield conditions. 🔹 He also stressed the importance of deeper cooperation, including technology exchange and joint growth of the defense sectors, citing WB Electronics as a model and urging expansion of similar initiatives to strengthen technological advantages. Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇵🇱 🇺🇦 Defence24报道称，波兰计划在乌克兰测试其军事装备和无人机。🔹 国防部副部长切扎里·托姆奇克表示，由于积极的战斗，乌克兰是一个“独特的测试环境”，系统首先在波兰进行评估，然后在真实的战场条件下进行评估。🔹 他还强调了深化合作的重要性，包括技术交流和国防部门的共同增长，并以WB Electronics为例，敦促扩大类似举措以加强技术优势。视频由grok AI生成 推文

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz: "I had doubts from the very beginning about what started with the Iran war. We in Germany and in Europe are suffering considerably from the consequences, for example, from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. This has direct effects on our energy supply and massive effects on our economic performance. And therefore, I am pushing for this conflict to be resolved." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 德国总理默茨：“从一开始，我就对伊朗战争的起因存有疑虑。我们德国和欧洲正深受其后果之苦，例如霍尔木兹海峡的关闭。这对我们的能源供应有直接影响，对我们的经济表现有巨大影响。因此，我正在推动解决这一冲突。”推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the Lebanese Army, a military official and a family member were killed when an Israeli strike targeted their motorcycle in the town of Kharbet Selm. This marks the second time in 24 hours that the Israel Defense Force has targeted Lebanese military personnel and positions. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据黎巴嫩军队发布的消息，一名军事官员及其家人在以色列对卡尔贝特塞尔姆镇的一次摩托车袭击中丧生。这是以色列国防军在24小时内第二次针对黎巴嫩军事人员和阵地。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s toman has hit a new low, with the U.S. dollar surpassing 180,000 tomans – up from 160,000 the previous day. The currency opened at around 165,000 tomans and continued its decline amid renewed U.S. sanctions, the ongoing U.S. naval blockade, and political uncertainty over the war, intensifying public concern over economic stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗土曼汇率跌至新低，美元兑土曼汇率超过180,000——高于前一天的160,000。受美国新制裁、持续的美国海军封锁以及战争带来的政治不确定性影响，货币开盘价约为165,000土曼并持续下跌，加剧了公众对经济稳定的担忧。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and the destruction of homes in southern Lebanon, we targeted two Merkava tanks in Qana at 17:00 on April 28, carrying out two surprise attacks and achieving direct…" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a second statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and attacks on villages in southern Lebanon causing civilian casualties, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Qantara at 18:00 on April 28 with a rocket strike.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：“为回应以色列的停火违规行为和对黎巴嫩南部房屋的破坏，我们在4月28日17:00袭击了卡纳的两辆梅卡瓦坦克，进行了两次突袭并直接命中……” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 真主党发表了第二份声明：“为回应以色列的停火违规行为和对黎巴嫩南部村庄造成平民伤亡的袭击，我们在4月28日18:00用火箭弹袭击了坎塔拉的以色列士兵集结地。” @wfwitness

text: An Israeli activist confronts the Israeli ambassador about the genocide in Gaza during his speech in Leipzig: Israel is killing children every day!
text_zh: 一位以色列活动人士在莱比锡的演讲中当面质问以色列大使关于加沙种族灭绝的问题：以色列每天都在杀害儿童！

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and the destruction of homes in southern Lebanon, we targeted two Merkava tanks in Qana at 17:00 on April 28, carrying out two surprise attacks and achieving direct hits.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：“为回应以色列违反停火协议及在黎巴嫩南部摧毁房屋的行为，我们在4月28日17:00袭击了卡纳（Qana）的两辆梅卡瓦坦克，进行了两次突袭并直接命中目标。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 CNN: An Israeli military battalion has been redeployed after a one-month suspension following an incident where they assaulted and detained a CNN team covering settler violence in Tayasir, West Bank. The unit, under the Netzah Yehuda Battalion, underwent an education seminar and additional training before being allowed to return to full operation activities. The IDF called the incident a “serious ethical and professional failure,” but the soldier who assaulted the CNN photojournalist has not faced any additional known suspension or disciplinary measures. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：以色列一个军事营在停职一个月后被重新部署。此前该营曾袭击并拘留了一支在约旦河西岸塔亚西尔（Tayasir）报道定居者暴力的CNN团队。该部队隶属于内扎·耶胡达营（Netzah Yehuda Battalion），在获准恢复全面作战活动前接受了教育研讨会和额外培训。以色列国防军称该事件是“严重的道德和职业失职”，但袭击CNN摄影记者的士兵并未面临任何已知的额外停职或纪律处分。 @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 ⚡️ Ursula von der Liar took the floor today and declared: "We are finally seeing a truce after weeks of violence, but now we need peace and stability through diplomatic means. The consequences of this conflict may echo for months or even years to come." "Any peace agreement will have to address Iran's nuclear and missile program." In the same breath, von der Liar added that the EU wants the ceasefires in Iran and Lebanon to hold, and called for restoring "full and permanent freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz without tolls." 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇪🇺 ⚡️ 乌苏拉·冯德莱恩今天发言称：“在经历了数周的暴力冲突后，我们终于看到了停火，但现在我们需要通过外交手段实现和平与稳定。这场冲突的后果可能会在未来数月甚至数年内持续回响。”“任何和平协议都必须解决伊朗的核与导弹计划。”与此同时，冯德莱恩还补充说，欧盟希望伊朗和黎巴嫩的停火能够维持，并呼吁恢复“霍尔木兹海峡的全面且永久的航行自由，且不征收通行费”。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Russia will hold its May 9 Victory Day parade in Moscow without tanks or heavy military equipment, citing the current situation.
text_zh: 俄罗斯表示，鉴于当前局势，今年5月9日的莫斯科胜利日阅兵将不展示坦克或重型军事装备。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 «Умеренная оппозиция» 📝 Во Франции строят дискурс по сирийской модели Масштабное наступление коалиции исламистов и сепаратистов в Мали заставило французский истеблишмент экстренно искать способы обеления радикалов. В медиапространстве Пятой республики стартовала дискуссия на тему: «А как нам теперь строить отношения с бывшими террористами ?». Издание Le Point решило зайти с козырей, опросив профильных «экспертов по региону». В отличие от ангажированных бенинских аналитиков, французские спикеры пока проявляют осторожность и признают: сценарий «эволюции» запрещенной в РФ группировки «Джамаат Нусрат аль-Ислам валь-Муслимин» в нечто «инклюзивное» и рукопожатное крайне маловероятен . 📌 Однако сам факт появления подобных вопросов в мейнстримных СМИ — тревожный маркер. Вслед за осторожными скептиками обязательно появятся более лояльные спикеры, которые начнут продвигать тезис о «необходимости диалога ради стабильности». Да и о том, что исламисты явно будут приятнее руководству Елисейского Дворца, чем русские никто не скрывает. #Мали #медиатехнологии #Франция 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ：📝 “温和反对派” 📝 法国正在构建叙利亚模式的话语体系。马里伊斯兰主义者和分裂主义者联盟的大规模进攻，迫使法国建制派紧急寻找洗白激进分子的方法。法兰西第五共和国的媒体空间开启了一个讨论话题：“我们现在该如何与前恐怖分子建立关系？”《观点报》（Le Point）决定出奇制胜，采访了该地区的专业“专家”。与那些有偏见的贝宁分析师不同，法国发言人目前表现谨慎，并承认：在俄罗斯被禁的“伊斯兰和穆斯林支持阵营”（JNIM）组织“进化”成某种“包容性”且可接受实体的可能性极低。 📌 然而，此类问题出现在主流媒体本身就是一个令人不安的信号。在谨慎的怀疑论者之后，必然会出现更忠诚的发言人，开始推动“为了稳定需要对话”的论点。而且，伊斯兰主义者显然比俄罗斯人更受爱丽舍宫领导层的欢迎，这一点也无人掩饰。 #马里 #媒体技术 #法国 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: German Chancellor Merz: The developments over the past year — not least in Iran in recent months — show how important investments in our defense capability are. We want to be able to defend ourselves.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：过去一年的事态发展——尤其是近几个月伊朗的情况——表明对我们国防能力的投资有多么重要。我们希望能够保卫自己。

text: German Chancellor Merz: I had doubts from the very beginning about what started with the Iran war. We in Germany and in Europe are suffering considerably from the consequences — for example, from the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. This has direct effects on our energy supply and massive effects on our economic performance. And therefore, I am pushing for this conflict to be resolved.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：从一开始我就对伊朗战争的起因存有疑虑。我们德国和欧洲正深受其后果之苦——例如霍尔木兹海峡的关闭。这对我们的能源供应有直接影响，并对我们的经济表现产生巨大影响。因此，我敦促解决这场冲突。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Hassan Fadlallah stated rhat Hezboallah will destroy Israel’s attempt to establish a security zone on Lebanese land and create a “new Antoine” (a reference to Antoine Lahad, the former head of Israel’s proxy South Lebanon Army). He vowed that the resistance would achieve this through the sacrifice of its military wing and the steadfastness of the Lebanese people. Fadlallah called on the Lebanese government to immediately abandon any thought of concessions, warning that the daily killing of unarmed civilians in southern Lebanon and the systematic destruction of border villages threaten the country’s stability. He stressed that the government will not obtain national support for its direct negotiations with Israel, no matter how hard it tries. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员哈桑·法德拉拉（Hassan Fadlallah）表示，真主党将粉碎以色列在黎巴嫩领土上建立安全区并制造“新安托万”（指以色列代理人南黎巴嫩军前领导人安托万·拉哈德）的企图。他誓言抵抗力量将通过其军事派别的牺牲和黎巴嫩人民的坚定不移来实现这一目标。法德拉拉呼吁黎巴嫩政府立即放弃任何让步的想法，警告称在黎巴嫩南部每天杀害手无寸铁的平民和系统性摧毁边境村庄的行为威胁着国家的稳定。他强调，无论政府如何努力，都不会在与以色列的直接谈判中获得国民支持。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated On the night of April 29, Ukrainian drones attacked Russian oil facilities in Orsk and the Perm Krai of the Russian Federation, located 1,500 kilometers from the Ukrainian border. According to the publication Astra, which conducted an OSINT analysis, the Orsknefteorgsintez oil refinery in Orsk was targeted. This is one of Russia's largest refineries, with a processing capacity of approximately 6 million tons of oil per year. According to information from the Exilenova+ channel, a linear production and dispatch station in Perm is likely on fire following the strikes. This facility serves as a key node in the Transneft system, responsible for pumping, storing, and distributing oil via main pipelines. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 4月29日晚，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯奥尔斯克和彼尔姆边疆区的石油设施，这些设施距离乌克兰边境1500公里。据进行开源情报（OSINT）分析的Astra媒体报道，奥尔斯克的奥尔斯克炼油厂（Orsknefteorgsintez）成为目标。这是俄罗斯最大的炼油厂之一，年加工石油能力约600万吨。据Exilenova+频道消息，彼尔姆的一个线性生产调度站可能在袭击后起火。该设施是俄罗斯石油管道运输公司（Transneft）系统的关键节点，负责通过主管道输送、储存和分配石油。 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Volodymyr Zelensky: 📌 “The range of our long-distance ‘sanctions’ now exceeds 1,500 km. It is important that every strike reduces Russia’s military industry, logistics, and oil export capabilities. The results are visible to everyone. 📌 It is also clear that Russia must end this war. The time has come to move toward diplomacy, and Moscow should understand and accept this signal for its own good. Glory to Ukraine.” Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基：📌 “我们远程‘制裁’的射程现在超过了1500公里。重要的是，每一次打击都能削弱俄罗斯的军事工业、后勤和石油出口能力。结果大家有目共睹。 📌 同样清楚的是，俄罗斯必须结束这场战争。现在是转向外交的时候了，莫斯科应该为了自身利益理解并接受这一信号。荣耀属于乌克兰。” 视频由grok AI生成 tweet

text: Visioner RT @LIGHTNING5T : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 OPERATION SPIDERWEB June 1st, 2025. Deep inside Russian territory, a fleet of ordinary trucks carried a lethal secret. This was the start of Operation Spiderweb. 117 drones, smuggled over 18 months, were suddenly activated. No launch pads, no runways—just a trap waiting to be sprung. The targets: Russia’s most prized strategic bombers. Massive giants worth billions, sitting completely vulnerable on their own soil. In a matter of minutes, the sky fell. Precise, autonomous, and devastating. One-third of Russia’s long-range strike fleet was neutralized in a single blow. Seven billion dollars in hardware turned to ash. From the Arctic to Siberia, the 'Spiderweb' had successfully strangled the enemy's air power. Modern warfare has changed forever. Operation Spiderweb didn't just destroy planes; it proved that nowhere is out of reach. The web is broken. Video is AI generated. tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @LIGHTNING5T : 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 蜘蛛网行动（OPERATION SPIDERWEB） 2025年6月1日。在俄罗斯领土深处，一支普通的卡车车队运载着致命的秘密。这是“蜘蛛网行动”的开始。117架无人机在18个月内被秘密运入并突然激活。没有发射台，没有跑道——只有一个等待触发的陷阱。目标：俄罗斯最珍贵的战略轰炸机。这些价值数十亿的庞然大物，在自己的土地上完全处于脆弱状态。几分钟内，天空塌陷了。精确、自主且具有毁灭性。俄罗斯三分之一的远程打击机队在一次打击中被消灭。价值70亿美元的硬件化为灰烬。从北极到西伯利亚，“蜘蛛网”成功扼杀了敌人的空中力量。现代战争永远改变了。蜘蛛网行动不仅摧毁了飞机；它证明了没有地方是无法触及的。网已破。视频由AI生成。 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 Bloomberg: Saudi Aramco has suspended liquefied petroleum gas deliveries through May after damage to its Juaymah export facility. The disruption reportedly began after a support structure collapsed at the site in late February, cutting off supplies before the wider Middle East conflict escalated. Aramco has told some customers it has been unable to complete necessary repairs, meaning exports may remain offline even if regional shipping routes improve. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 彭博社：沙特阿美公司（Saudi Aramco）在朱艾马（Juaymah）出口设施受损后，已暂停液化石油气交付至五月。据报道，中断始于二月下旬该地点的一个支撑结构倒塌，在中东冲突升级前切断了供应。阿美公司已告知部分客户，由于无法完成必要的维修，即使区域航运路线改善，出口可能仍将保持离线状态。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Netanyahu in court today for allegedly accepting illegal gifts of cigars and champagne — worth nearly $200,000 in luxury items from Arnon Milchan. Apparently in Israel, human blood is free... but cigars and champagne come with a price. Disgusting. Blood-soaked hypocrisy. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 内塔尼亚胡今天出庭，因涉嫌接受非法礼物——包括从阿农·米尔臣（Arnon Milchan）处收受价值近20万美元的雪茄和香槟等奢侈品。显然在以色列，人血是免费的……但雪茄和香槟是有代价的。令人作呕。血腥的虚伪。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: An ageing Iranian supertanker, the Nasha, has appeared near Kharg Island after years off shipping trackers, suggesting Tehran may be bringing older vessels back into service as pressure mounts on its oil export system. the vessel’s reappearance may indicate Iran is seeking additional floating storage or transport capacity as sanctions and maritime restrictions tighten. Kharg Island remains Iran’s main oil export terminal, and growing congestion there has increased scrutiny of how Tehran is managing crude shipments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 彭博社：一艘老旧的伊朗超级油轮“Nasha”号在消失于航运追踪系统多年后，出现在哈尔克岛附近。这表明随着石油出口系统压力增大，德黑兰可能正在让旧船重新服役。该船的重新出现可能表明，随着制裁和海上限制的收紧，伊朗正在寻求额外的浮动存储或运输能力。哈尔克岛仍然是伊朗主要的石油出口终端，那里的拥堵加剧，使得人们对德黑兰如何管理原油运输的审查更加严格。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Germany’s Chancellor Merz: My relationship with the US president continues to be good. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049428767030849960/photo/1 Trump: The Chancellor of Germany, Friedrich Merz, thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. He doesn’t know what he’s talking about! If Iran had a Nuclear Weapon, the whole World would be held hostage. I am doing something with Iran, right now, that other Nations, or Presidents, should have done long ago. No wonder Germany is doing so poorly, both Economically, and otherwise! - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 德国总理默茨：我与美国总统的关系依然良好。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049428767030849960/photo/1 特朗普：德国总理弗里德里希·默茨认为伊朗拥有核武器是可以的。他根本不知道自己在说什么！如果伊朗拥有核武器，整个世界都将被劫持。我目前正在对伊朗采取行动，这是其他国家或总统早就应该做的。难怪德国在经济和其他方面都表现得如此糟糕！ - Open Source Intel 推文
